name: Form Validation Complete
description: Form validation logic should be formalized and decomposed to ensure all field combinations are handled — no valid input rejected, no invalid input accepted.
rationale: Form validation often has edge cases: empty strings, whitespace-only, unicode, boundary values. Decomposition finds every distinct validation path and generates test cases for each.

examples.passes: Formalize(signupValidation) → Decompose(15 regions) → tests cover: empty email, valid email, email with unicode, password too short, matching passwords, etc.
examples.fails: Signup form that accepts 'user@' as a valid email because the regex was never decomposed
